title: Malik's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Baby Malik discovers different colored foods through his senses, exploring red apples, yellow bananas, green peas, blue berries, and orange carrots in a joyful rainbow of tastes and colors.

pages.text: Malik loves colorful food! Red apple. Crunch, crunch!

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a bright red apple. Red paint splatters and drips dominate the scene with rainbow colors splashing around. Finger paint aesthetic with joyful pure red color exploration.
illustration.alt: Malik holding a red apple with red paint splatters

pages.text: Yellow banana! Malik peels and tastes. Yummy!

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes peels a bright yellow banana. Yellow paint dominates with splashy painterly strokes and paint splatter drips. Rainbow colors accent the sensory visual with finger paint aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Malik peeling a yellow banana with yellow paint effects

pages.text: Green peas roll! Pop, pop in Malik's mouth!

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes plays with rolling green peas. Green paint splatters and drips dominate the joyful scene with rainbow colors around. Splashy painterly style with sensory visual finger paint aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Malik playing with green peas with green paint splatters

pages.text: Blue berries! Malik picks them up. Sweet and squishy!

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes picks up blue berries. Blue paint dominates with splashy painterly drips and splatters. Rainbow colors create joyful pure color exploration with finger paint aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Malik picking up blue berries with blue paint effects

pages.text: Orange carrot! Malik nibbles. So many colors to eat!

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes nibbles an orange carrot. Orange paint splatters and drips dominate with rainbow colors swirling around. Sensory visual with joyful finger paint aesthetic and color exploration.
illustration.alt: Malik eating an orange carrot with orange paint splatters

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color is Malik's apple?
questions.explanation: Malik's apple is red! Red apples go crunch, crunch!

questions.question: What does Malik do with the banana?
questions.explanation: Malik peels the yellow banana and tastes it. Yummy!

questions.question: How do the berries feel?
questions.explanation: The blue berries are sweet and squishy when Malik picks them up!
